fuji_eterna_fuji.label: Fuji ETERNA 250D
fuji_eterna_fuji.description: Warm and cinematic Fuji ETERNA film stock with Fuji 3510 print. Rich, saturated colors with smooth skin tones. Great for golden hour and lifestyle shots.

fuji_eterna_kodak.label: Fuji ETERNA Kodak
fuji_eterna_kodak.description: Fuji ETERNA 250D film stock printed on Kodak 2395. Slightly cooler and more neutral than the Fuji print. Clean highlights and natural midtones.

fuji_f125_kodak_2393.label: Fuji F125 Classic
fuji_f125_kodak_2393.description: Fine grain Fuji F125 stock on Kodak 2393 print. Natural, true-to-life colors with excellent shadow detail. Ideal for portraits and documentary.

fuji_f125_kodak_2395.label: Fuji F125 Warm
fuji_f125_kodak_2395.description: Fuji F125 stock on Kodak 2395 print. Slightly warmer rendition than the 2393 version. Soft contrast with pleasing highlight rolloff.

fuji_reala.label: Fuji REALA 500D
fuji_reala.description: Fuji REALA 500D — known for its exceptionally accurate skin tones and fine grain. Neutral and clean, great for any lighting condition.

kodak_5205.label: Kodak Vision3 50D
kodak_5205.description: Kodak 5205 (Vision3 50D) daylight stock. Clean, neutral and sharp. Minimal grain, wide dynamic range. Perfect for bright outdoor scenes.

kodak_5218_2383.label: Kodak 500T Warm
kodak_5218_2383.description: Kodak 5218 (Vision3 500T) tungsten-balanced stock on Kodak 2383 print. Warm, rich shadows and creamy highlights. Classic cinema look.

kodak_5218_2395.label: Kodak 500T Natural
kodak_5218_2395.description: Kodak 5218 tungsten stock on Kodak 2395 print. Slightly cooler and more contrasty than the 2383 version. Gritty, textured film feel.
